title: Amanda Winn Lee and Tiffany Grant interviews on 918 The Fan
display_title: Amanda Winn Lee and Tiffany Grant interviews on 918 The Fan
wikitext:
[]: Amanda Winn-Lee and Tiffany Grant interviews on 91.8 The Fan             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu May 20, 2010 8:24 am Amanda Winn-Lee was interviewed by some online radio show a couple days ago called 91.8 The Fan . A lot of the interview deals with Neon Genesis Evangelion 's Rei Ayanami she voices in the English version and the two films she oversaw subbing. Surprisingly, she even admits to preferring the subs over dubs. You can hear the interview here: http://918thefan.com/2010/kanas-korner-interview-with-amanda-winn-lee/

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu May 20, 2010 10:20 am Man. That was a weird blast from the past. She really dropped off the planet after the Eva movies. I'm curious what forums she went on back in the day. Certainly not an Eva forums, I would remember something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu May 20, 2010 10:57 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I'm curious what forums she went on back in the day. Certainly not an Eva forums, I would remember something like that.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu May 20, 2010 12:07 pm She oversaw subbing? What does that mean? Is she a translator/editor/Eva connossieur?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu May 20, 2010 12:09 pm AchtungAffen wrote: She oversaw subbing? What does that mean? Is she a translator/editor/Eva connossieur?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu May 20, 2010 12:18 pm I don't understand how she can reconcile her assertion that she tries to be as faithful as possible with how she alters sound effects. When you change something that doesn't need to be changed, you're not being as faithful as possible. I think the voice acting was better on average, but the addition of certain sound effects really soured me on the movie's dub.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Thu May 20, 2010 8:12 pm I'm not a fan of the sound effects she added either, but I'm even more put off by her ADR directing...I'll give her a pass on the two F-bombs in EoE, but the fact that a number of characters didn't even pronounce "Eva" correctly shows a critical lack of attention to detail. Hopefully whoever gets the rights to EoE gives it a fresh dub.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu May 20, 2010 8:42 pm Sound effects suck. Shinji and Misato's voices are better. Other voices suck. The added fucks were more Woolseyisms than errors. They were better. Over all, however, I prefer subs for the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu May 20, 2010 9:25 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Well, she mentions in the interview that she wrote the English scripts for both the dub and sub of EoE. I forgot what all that entailed for her. I haven't watch the movie's commentary in a good long while.

[]: Amanda Winn-Lee & Tiffany Grant interviewed on 91.8 The             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri May 21, 2010 1:39 pm That sounds about right. I found another interview by the same folks, guesting Tiffany Grant. http://918thefan.com/2010/kanas-korner-interview-with-tiffany-grant/ It's a bit more dated (last month) and not quite as Eva related (really?); she talks about cos-playing and glances upon meeting Matt Greenfield. The main things she hits are the voice jobs she's done. She also says that she's currently working with Funimation, and they seem to be getting Rebuild rights... (Although there's absolutely no news on Rebuild 2.22.)

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Fri May 21, 2010 5:34 pm ...and to think both would not be around anymore... boy, was I wrong. I wonder if Tiffany Grant would come back as Asuka in Evangelion 2.0...

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri May 21, 2010 6:40 pm tomrule123 wrote: ...and to think both would not be around anymore... boy, was I wrong. I wonder if Tiffany Grant would come back as Asuka in Evangelion 2.0...

[]: That was actually Asuka's non-evil twin, Akusa.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Fri May 21, 2010 7:59 pm esselfortium wrote: Wait, Asuka appeared in 2.0? I must have missed her somehow :-\

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Fri May 21, 2010 8:46 pm I pretty much figure that Tiffany Grant as Asuka in 2.0 is inevitable

[]: Asuka is related to something that's NOT evil? Really?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri May 21, 2010 9:04 pm I would say that not seeing Tiffany Grant in 2.0 would be a pleasant surprise, but I don't really watch the English dubs anyway. So it really doesn't matter to me. But I did find it interesting to see what's going with the USA side of the anime industry. I honesty thought everything Tiffany would say would be about Eva, since she swims up to her ears in Asuka figurines and such.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri May 21, 2010 11:41 pm I still think Tiffany Grant is the worst element of the english dubs (instead of Asuka coming off as a full rounded character she comes off as nothing more than a bitch) but she has such a strong fanbase in the English anime circles that her getting the Asuka role is a given. Only reason she wouldn't get it would be if Funimation wanted to stick it to Mrs. Greenfield. Regardless I couldn't give two shits. The dubs are nothing more than a one off watch for me usually.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Sat May 22, 2010 12:02 pm I really can't see what the problem is. I liked Tiffany Grant's rendition of Asuka, and if she doesn't get the role, Funimation is going to have to pay dearly. Besides, I like dubs most of the time, but EVA is the one anime that I can watch in both subs and dubs.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat May 22, 2010 2:49 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: I really can't see what the problem is. I liked Tiffany Grant's rendition of Asuka, and if she doesn't get the role, Funimation is going to have to pay dearly.

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Mon May 24, 2010 2:21 pm Nice find.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Thu Jun 10, 2010 1:46 am GasmaskAvenger wrote: I pretty much figure that Tiffany Grant as Asuka in 2.0 is inevitable
